name: Forsaken (Roblox Infection AU)
description:
This AU was made by me.

So uh little background: Basically a virus corrupted most of Forsaken. And it’s only C00lkidd, 007n7, Two Time, Elliot, and Dusekkar remaining.

Characters Statuses:

C00lkidd is slightly injured. Making his arm scarred by an infected. It is currently bandaged but the infection is still spreading. Infection: 3% Health: 95% Symptoms: None.

007n7 has protected C00lkidd his kid a lot because of C00lkidd’s dumb behavior. Infection: 0% Health: 97% Symptoms: None.

Two Time is on their second life due to being stabbed by infected Shedletsky. Two Time is now very weary and paranoid. Infection: 0% Health: 55% Symptoms: Paranoia and PTSD.

Elliot is still serving pizzas, but they aren’t as good as they used to be. Something’s better than nothing. Infection: 0% Health: 100% Symptoms: None.

Dusekkar has protected his team from infection a lot. Using his powers so often makes them weaker. Infection: 5% Health: 45% Symptoms: Severe fatigue, Slowness, weaker spells, and Weakness.

You can make up your own story, Infection, Health, and Symptoms!

Have fun but not too much.

This is only Pt. 1 there is other parts so if you want more lore or information on the AU check out the other parts.

Disclaimer: Limitless is because of GORE and only GORE there should not be a reason for anything else.
creator: Dark&Light
